nasb.text: Now the woman was a Gentile, of the Syrophoenician race. And she kept asking Him to cast the demon out of her daughter.

esv.text: Now the woman was a Gentile, a Syrophoenician by birth. And she begged him to cast the demon out of her daughter.

cnv.text: 這女人是外族人，屬於敘利亞的腓尼基族。她求耶穌把鬼從她女兒身上趕出去。

csbs.text: 这妇人是希腊人，出生在叙利亚的腓尼基。她请求耶稣把鬼魔从她女儿身上赶出去。
